seo.title: 3-Day Split
seo.description: Torch fat. Increase strength. 3 workouts a week.

trainers.bioBodi: Super Trainer Autumn Calabrese is the creator of 4 Weeks For Every Body™, 21 Day Fix® and as well as other breakthrough fitness programs, the nutrition program The 4 Week Gut Protocol®, FIXATE®, and the Portion Fix® eating plan. She’s a certified holistic health coach through the Institute of Integrative Nutrition and has held certifications from NASM and AFPA.

data.descriptionShort: Torch fat. Increase strength. 3 workouts a week.
data.descriptionLong: Torch fat, increase total-body strength, and build stamina with 30-50 minute workouts just 3 days a week for 4 weeks.

modules.categories: Strength, Muscle Building, Cardio, Athletic Training, Weight Loss

79b13014-bf12-44c3-aba8-3d7b6a10411c.title: Meet Autumn
79b13014-bf12-44c3-aba8-3d7b6a10411c.descriptionLong: In this heartwarming video, get to know your Super Trainer Autumn Calabrese as she highlights pivotal moments of her life leading up to her 10th Beachbody program 9 Week Control Freak, and how all of her expertise can help you take control of your health, nutrition, fitness, and sleep.

trainers.bio: Super Trainer Autumn Calabrese is the creator of 4 Weeks For Every Body™, 21 Day Fix® and as well as other breakthrough fitness programs, the nutrition program The 4 Week Gut Protocol®, FIXATE®, and the Portion Fix® eating plan. She’s a certified holistic health coach through the Institute of Integrative Nutrition and has held certifications from NASM and AFPA.

axEdta4kzsrcdbvqPRiHpD.title: High 5's Cardio
axEdta4kzsrcdbvqPRiHpD.descriptionLong: Put your dumbbells aside for this bodyweight-only cardio session. Two circuits of five moves will leave you sweaty, smiling, and feeling stronger than ever.
